posts.body: Dunkin’ Rewards® members, here is your wake up call! Enjoy 4X points on a Wake-Up Wrap® sandwich purchase today, 3/23 when this offer is activated in the app. Terms apply.
It’s the biggest deal in breakfast! For a limited time, get a medium Coffee + Bacon, Egg and Cheese + Hash Browns for $6. Terms and exclusions apply.

Dunkin’ Rewards® members, get ready to slay the slump! When you activate this offer in the app, you can sip away and stay caffeinated! For $3, try a NEW medium Dunkin’ Zero from 1PM to close, through 3/18. Made with zero sugar, these sips are packed with 145mg of caffeine and B vitamins. Terms apply.

50 bonus points? Now that’s sweet! When they activate this offer in the app, Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 50 bonus points each day they add Chocolate Cold Foam to any beverage through 3/2. Terms & excl. apply.

Dunkin’ Rewards® members, this is a race to the finish! Activate this badge challenge in the app and earn up to 250 bonus points and a FREE Classic Donut! Through 2/22, complete the Winter Winner challenge by making Dunkin’ runs and earn bonuses along the way. Terms apply.

Share the love at Dunkin’! Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 3X points on an order of espresso drinks for Valentine’s Day today, 2/14, when they activate this offer in the app. It’s a perfect time to fall for our NEW Toxic Ex-presso Latte. Terms & excl. apply.
Refresh it every day at Dunkin’! Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 3X points on a daily order of Dunkin’ Refreshers through 2/7 when they activate this offer in the app. Terms & excl. apply.

Valentine’s Day is brewing at Dunkin’! For a limited time, fall in love with these treats! From our NEW Toxic Ex-presso to our NEW Chocolate Covered Strawberry Daydream Refresher, there is always something to satisfy your craving. Don’t forget to celebrate with the return of our Brownie Batter and Cupid’s Choice Donuts!

Dunkin’ has your snow day essentials! Through 1/25, Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 3X points on boxes of donuts and MUNCHKINS® Donut Hole Treats when they activate this offer in the app. Terms & excl. apply.
Get your protein on us! Dunkin’ Rewards® members can add our NEW protein milk to any Latte for FREE now through 1/27. Terms & excl. apply.

raw_data.subtypes: Coffee shop, Bagel shop, Bakery, Breakfast restaurant, Donut shop, Fast food restaurant, Takeout Restaurant

reviews_data.review_text: 40 minutes wait for a coffee and a bagel.....felt like this was their first day in business but they have been there for years.
Quick and easy one amd out!
Great breakfast sandwiches and of course, the donuts. Great variety for everyone!
Excellent service and pleasant atmosphere; however, the coffee is somewhat bitter, depending on the shift. ☕

I went in about an hour before closing and ordered a hot decaf coffee and some munchkins. I was told that they had no coffee. (What?!?!  It’s a coffee and donut shop!). After asking for a refund of what I had paid at the ordering kiosk, I was offered a latte instead, which I turned down because I wanted a hot coffee When I mentioned I would take regular coffee if they didn’t have decaf, a server told me that they had decaf. I told her that was my order and that was what I wanted so she proceeded to bring me a decaf. She also gathered my munchkins and even put in a few extra, which I appreciated. When I took a sip of the decaf coffee, it was cold. Cold. Not even lukewarm . Cold.  I asked if there was a way for them to heat it, maybe stick it in a microwave or something, but was told there was no way to do that. All in all it was a very disappointing trip, the worst experience I’ve ever had at a Dunkin - and I’ve frequented lots of Dunkins over the years. I want to be clear that the server was polite and treated me respectfully, but the store was unable to provide its basic menu drink item, a hot cup of coffee.  Ridiculous!

I want to give a huge shoutout to the Dunkin’ Donuts located on Old Statesville and Catawba in Cornelius. Even though this location doesn’t have a drive-thru—which can be a little inconvenient—the service here truly makes the walk worth it.

Every time I visit, the employees are full of joy, energy, and genuine smiles. From my experience, they consistently go above and beyond to make sure their customers leaves happy. There are several Dunkin’ locations closer to me, but I choose to drive the extra mile to this one simply because of their outstanding customer service.

I truly appreciate the crew at this location and want the managers to know how wonderful their team is. Their kindness and positivity stand out every single day. Keep up the amazing work! 🎉☕️🍩
This place is Circus ,  This one guy all he do is talk with a lobby full of people . Don’t get me wrong the drinks are good but I pass on coming to this one
Terrible breakfast sandwich
I am absenced with avocado toast!

This is a cute location—don’t get me wrong. Unfortunately, this will likely be my first and last visit. The staff really needs to work on their customer service skills.

I came in specifically for a Cookie Dough Dunkalatte and was told they only had Brown Sugar and that they don’t sell anything cookie dough-related. Meanwhile, right behind them, their sign clearly advertised both a Cookie Dough frozen beverage and a Cookie Dough coffee. When I pointed this out, it wasn’t addressed—and the tone I got from Erik (at least that’s the name on my receipt) felt passive-aggressive the entire time.

The one bright spot was the person who handed me my food—they were polite and pleasant. It’s a shame, because the visit started off with potential, but the experience didn’t live up to it.

I order from here frequently but this morning in particular the hash browns were nice and hot and my bagel sandwich was delicious as well! (And I ordered a plain bagel by mistake but wasn’t even disappointed) So thank you to whoever made my mobile order around 8am on 6/2!
Great food and people.
Some of the workers here really do a great job, and some of them will mess my order up every single time, without fail, and rant about their boss openly. It’s always a coin flip if you go here.

I just want to take a minute to recognize the amazing staff at the dunkin donuts on zion street in cornelius nc. Most of the staff appear to be younger adults and high school students. They give great customer service. They are always polite and they communicate well with each other when it gets busy. And this store does get busy. These kids work! Trey was especially helpful this morning but he's always a ray of sunshine. Seriously. He's great! For reference I have been a regular at this store. Everyday. For the past year. These kids do a very good job!

Can't speak to the customer service, as I walked in and right out. This store is filthy... Floors littered with trash and spills.  If this is what the customer sees I don't even want to see the back of the house.

I love this Dunkin. It's really special to go into a national chain and be treated like I'm walking into my local coffee shop. The food and drinks are always great and super fresh. My elderly mom goes in almost every day, and she's treated beautifully and with great respect every time, which is something you don't see all the time in our culture, and something I hugely appreciate. The manager, Dimitri, seems to pretty much always be there, and he obviously takes great pride in the store and in the performance of his staff.

Just close it down.
Couldn’t get any worse .  Everyone with their hoodies on,  take the trash out, don’t wash their hands and go straight to grab your donut
Well that was an expensive cup of ice.
Crappy service and the employees are rude and annoyed by customer. They work at Dunkin and can’t even make a coffee correctly.
Ishmael was amazing with his service and smile 😊 The Sabrina drink is 9/10 but good 😊  Thank you !

Hey I usually go here because it’s reliably good. But we threw out pretty much all the food we got. For $20 two coffees were horrible. Peppermint mocha smelled like peppermint and tasted like water. Cappuccino was soooo bitter. The hash browns tasted like they were cooked in old oil with a weird fishy taste. $20!!!! Go somewhere else.
Beautiful inside.

I called in a total Hail Mary the morning of Sept. 26th and the staff on duty were able to help me so efficiently and kindly. I can't say enough about how accommodating the staff is - they made about 10 gallons of coffee in 20 minutes. Thank you thank you thank you!!
THEE best Dunkin! Order is always accurate which can be hard to come by. Fast service and kind people!
Too slow to be in business. It's like it's their first time doing anything except taking money.

Thank you to the sweet man who served us. When my son's ice cream fell on the floor I thought his little heart was going to be crushed, but honey, you whipped him up another scoop and told him it was going to be ok so fast he had no chance to shed a tear. Lol thank you for being you!

I’ve been coming here for a few years. I use the app religiously and nervous to see how much money I’ve actually spent here. There has been a high turnover with staff over the years. The current staff knows the product and has been here for a while now. They are extremely courteous, kind and fun to talk with. I’m only giving 4 stars because the frozen coffee machine has been down for 2 weeks. I’m holding that 5th star hostage until it’s fixed. I don’t want it mixed in the Baskin Robbins side as a substitute. I’ll call the owner, Bob D Donut, myself if I have to.

I am a DAILY customer of the Zion Street location in Cornelius, NC. Due to the heat & humidity today I requested a small cup of tap water for my dog when picking up my order. I was told there would be a charge of $0.55
which I declined on principal. I guess 55 cents is more important than retaining a loyal customer!
Always quick and friendly service
Nice Dunkin. Very  busy one. Typical chain donut shop fare. Coffee tasted stale even at morning rush.

This place disappointed. Both breakfast sandwiches came out ice cold. Then when they remade the sandwiches the came out cold again. Also I’ve asked for the new white chocolate hazelnut coffee and the past 3 weeks the say that they are out of white chocolate!

Came in at 6:20 on a Wednesday & the cashier was sitting talking to her friend who does not work there and did not want to take our order because “they did not know the password to the computer to be able to take the order and the manager wasn’t there.” How are you gonna be open and not know the password to take orders. That’s crazy.

Usually go with my daughter almost every Sunday like around 4 and I order the same caramel macchiato but today was bitter and disgusting plus the girl server was rude they need to pay attention to the costumers instead of the boyfriend.....today is the last time me and my daughter are going to your business......and kind of regret not asking for my money back!!!

Two young boys were the only employees serving. My husband and I waited 20 minutes for 2 coffees and I had to keep asking for the 2nd drink. They made sporadic drinks for different orders. All of the customers in the store were frustrated. My coffee was not made correctly and they were playing the worst country music. Was not worth the time or money. They needed a supervisor present.
Superb service 👏 staff
Pretty friendly. Pretty good milkshake.

Great food.
9/26/2023:  Poor service.  Sourdough Breakfast Sandwich quality has degraded.
The store is clean. The team is somewhat friendly. My orders have been prompt and made correctly.
This is a great DD. It's huge & very clean. The employees are so nice.
Coffee ☕️ and free Wi-Fi
Great Sour Cream Donuts!🥯😬

Haven't been to a Dunkin in quiet some time. Went in to get a Hot Fudge Sundae, they did have it on the menu.
The employee at counter said she wasn't sure if they had Hot Fudge, they are often out but then checked and said they did.
I got a scoop of ice cream in a cup with a spoonful of thick brown clumpy sludge on top. They were also out of nuts and whipped cream.
So really no sundae. Poor Experience all around.
Dunkin is Dunkin is Dunkin. This one was well kept, and the staff were quick and pleasant.

Been a customer for years. This place had gone downhill for the past 10 years. All the coffee tastes the same. Burned. The overpriced breakfast sandwiches taste microwaved and not fresh @ all. I ordered the sourdough breakfast sandwich with “fried eggs” cheese and bacon. I assumed the bread would be toasted. Nope. Stale & chewy. It was all bread, the sandwich was put together sloppy. Two tiny pieces of rubbery bacon with no flavor. Eggs were microwaved with gross sour cheese. Just an all around disappointment. I’m done with Dunkin’s
Not the best place too many Karens
got there at drive up 7:40 pm 5/21/23...was told closed and no food available! supposed to be open until 8 pm! the 3rd time this happened. had to drive back to mcdonalds. NEVER AGAIN!!!!

I love Dunkin. I truly do but today we went and saw so much food thrown in the trash. I am so confused as to why we do this knowing people are starving and hungry. I think the closing manager should take what is left over at the end of the day and feed the homeless. And not only at this Dunkin but at evey Dunkin and restaurants as well. This is the only reason I am giving this place a 3. This was hard to see knowing I was once homeless and hungry. We as a country need to do better.
Order ahead and ready in minutes
Good staff and selection.

If there were a Zero Star option, I would have chosen Zero.
Terrible experience. Ordered a small Chai Tea Latte. 10 minutes later I went to check on my order. One girl looks at the other, and come to find out my ticket wasn't dropped. Another 5 minutes go by, still no Chai Tea Latte. Ended up getting a full refund, ironically as the manager is starting her shift and says, "I don't have time to deal with this right now." I guess the customer service, or lack there of is unimportant at this location? No one, including the manager, even attempted to fix a simple wrong. I will not be going back to this location.

Very busy and excellent workers work fast.
Had sour dough sandwich which was large and nice. Positive experience.
Same again
It's a Dunkin. Nothing more nothing less.
Slow and understaffed during peak hours, self-service kiosk is broken. Don’t come here thinking you’ll get a quick in-and-out.

Been to this location several times and noticed on the weekends a lot of students like to hang out, which is great. The problem is when they're a distraction for the staff. I ordered on the go curbside from my car and waited more than 6 minutes before coming inside to find the staff standing around talking. When asked about my order he stated he didn't see my car and when later asked to remake the drink his attitude was dismissive. Thankfully another cashier stepped in to help.
My favorite.... always went on my way to work....love it!!!
Good menu, good prices but the hash browns were a little bit burn

This is out of the ordinary for me but I feel as though I must leave a third party review. I received a disturbing text message from a friend who stated he had gone to the bathroom at said Dunkin’ Donuts. I was informed they were out of toilet paper, which always brings a bathroom review way down. Thinking outside the box, paper towels were the best option. Guess what happened next. You guess it, another bathroom trying to save the planet by using an air drier! How many more times do customers need to suffer by not having paper towels? Wake up America, not having paper towels in a bathroom isn’t saving a planet. You’re losing customers by doing this. I would highly recommend not using the bathroom. As they have no means of cleaning yourself and I have idea what was ultimately used for toilet paper in that bathroom today. Again, really scary receiving a text like this from a close friend. Really disappointed to start my day like this.

review_questions.null: Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: Wonderful location, and the brewed coffee was amazing! I have not tried an actual coffee drink yet, but I love all the different options you can add to your brew without a million extra charges! Super delicious and will definitely be going back!!
Did not have a good selection of donuts to chose from. Staff needs to be trained
The employees here are SO NICE.

manager was in the back no one in the front to wait on me got the manager to the front he was not friendly made me the wrong drink not at all what I ordered and the girl beside him wiped her nose with her hand and did not go wash her hands and I told the manager what I saw he didn't seem to care
and then I got my money back and will not go back to the one at Zion in Cornelius
Always good here

The best
Good service.
Very friendly, very fast.
We stop here every morning. Place is clean. You get in and out pretty quick.
Love it.
Great service. Very friendly staff.
Terrible Service, save your self time and money and drive down the road to the other Dunkin’ location!

Kudos to the staff that just helped us 2 ladies out as they were closing early due to lack of staff. We both sincerely appreciate you for helping us out in a tough situation! You both ROCK!!!
Seems everyone is struggling to find enough help to cover the increase in business so hang in there, Duncan needs you...and we appreciate your kindness so much!😉
Its Dunkin what more could you ask for! This location is close to my work so I am a frequent visitor. The cold brew pumpkin is especially delicious! High five highly recommended!
I have been enjoying the 100% guatemalan coffee with flavor shots!
Standing in line, waiting to order and cashier let's someone pay for coffee ahead of me. Left and will never go back.
All the employees were super sweet. Store was clean & organized

Walked in the door at around 8:30pm (store closes at 9) and the worker, who clearly has never been trained in customer service, practically shoved us out of the door with a rolling trash can. She said the store was closing and that she wouldn’t serve us. I rarely ever write poor reviews, but her demeanor and attitude were completely uncalled for. Please reevaluate your staff.
It was awesome

This place is very poorly managed. Though the employees have always been polite, the service is typically slow and they never know what promotions they have going on. The employees don't wear masks, even when they are mandated. I watched a visibly ill employee, with no face covering, cough right by the donuts and right into her hands, then proceed to continue ringing people up and touching food without washing her hands or putting on gloves. This is not okay. Do better.
It's very clean, and the staff is courteous. Ice cream AND donuts under one roof should be illegal, but the grandkids love it!

The restaurant was clean and orderly and staff was friendly. The donuts had a decent amount of icing on them.. other ones I've been to were skimpy with icing for some reason. Also, I was able to go in and sit down with my family in this one.
Drinks are gross
Quick, standard. In and out.
Great frozen coffee!
D&D
Terrible.   That is my 2nd and final trip.  People were rude and wanted to argue about donuts.
Not busy, not much offered, expensive

I decided to try this location for the first time and it was extremely upsetting. I drove up to the window and ordered 3 large iced coffees, I asked the girl at the window to place the drinks in the tray and to place the tray in a bag to hold them steady so they wouldn’t topple over, she didn’t understand what that meant, after a couple of times of repeating myself another employee came up and I was so frustrated that I just asked for the bag to do it myself, at which point I was forced to bring the drinks from the drive-through window into the car myself, sure enough it toppled over! My entire center console, shifter, infotainment controls, seats and knobs were not only bathed but soaked in all the iced mocha coffee.  You need to find a better way to get multiple drinks fit in a way that this doesn’t happen, and in the meantime explain to your employees the simple concept of -Drinks in tray, tray in bag, & tie so they’re all firm and in place. The entire cabin of my car is now in need of a full detailing for this one minor screw up that could’ve been avoided with following a few simple steps! Also, this has never happened at the other location in Huntersville, so now I’ll know to only go there.
Enjoyed my visit. Prompt service
Only Garbage can outside
Very fast service clean store.
I'm not sure if the doughnuts are still cooked on-site or not, but this location lightly glazes their crullers and that makes all the difference.
Stopped there today they are very nice

Love the coffee......
UPDATE: 1/25/21
I love Dunkin I order everyday and sometimes twice a day. I wish this Dunkin wasn't the only one near my house. I think the employees are great and friendly. Great coffee but the manager at this one is so rude. She has no customer service skills. She gives the most unfriendly looks and her face just always looks mad. Obviously she knows she isn't going to get in trouble for treating customer horrible. I know of 3 different customers she has been rude too. And it's bc she messed up. Not giving the right bag to the right car or making the drink wrong. She acts like it's not her job to fix what she messed up. I'm almost convinced she has to be related to the owner. No one who cares about there business would keep someone like her employed otherwise. And again it's like she knows nothing is going to happen. Basically she will say that to you. I know they can see the reviews on here and at least 3 speak of the manger being rude. That should tell you something. Anyway I hope things get better at this store. I love Dunkin but I dread ordering and going there when she is there. Other than her the staff is great.....

I am very frustrated with the management at this location. The girl Jessica is always super rude even without any issues. I ordered breakfast the other morning with coffees and they forgot my food. After realizing the food wasn't in the bag, I called and the manager was very rude and said I parked in the wrong place, which was completely irrelevant and there is only 2 curbside spots. I will not be going back because after calling all they do is apologize and say that she has worked there a long time.
Very pleasant staff. Decaf coffee brewed and ready.Perfect cup of coffee.
My 7 year old daughter says, " it's very delicious, and their ice cream is the best". Bathrooms were neatly kept too.

Accidentally ordered at the wrong location through the app. Called that location and they said it happens all the time and they honor the order and help you call the app to get your refund. It happens to be Saturday which is outside the hours for customer service for the app. So I talked to a manager at my home store (this one) and talked to them. They said I'm out of luck. They would ring up my order and hopefully I could get my money back from the app on Monday. So I'm going to drive 30 minutes to the other store and 30 minutes back to get my $10 order and I'll never go to this store again. Treat me well and I'll give you my business which is twice a week. Tell me you can't help me and I'll just not visit your store again. Thanks.

Be a bit cautious at this store, some of the employees may not be well trained in sanitary procedure. One employee, using a gloved hand that had just been handling money pulled a tissue from the dispenser and used it to bag my donut. That’s fine, but she dropped the tissue in too, dirty side up, and dropped the next donut right on top of the dirty tissue which had just been in her money handling hand. That second tissue remained in the bag too, dirty side up. My regular Dublin’ seems not to have this problem, they use a tissue, drop the donuts, throw the tissue in the trash, pretty simple.
Food and coffee incorrect 50% of the time.
Manager super rude. During these times a little kindness goes far.
Very courteous, great customer service
Messed up my order. Though, they made my drink correctly free of charge and let me keep the wrong drink. Chicken croissant was ok. The bacon and croissant were burned.
Awesome people work there
Quaint store , off the beaten trail
Friendly service, hot coffee, sweet donuts
Employees are incredibly rude.
Very nice staff—. Attentive and friendly —just a suggestion making that patio look more inviting after walking the new greenway trail that just opened up across the street from you guys
Good store with greatanagement and service.
Friendly staff and very fast I just wish they will get my order right.
Always quick service and friendly people
Always good coffee & donuts!
I was a bit disappointed. The coffee was weak and I found the donuts old.
Great employees that work there!
Too expensive
My morning stop
Good food and service
Yummy
I love Dunkin' DONUTS great tastin' and service is always Great.

Everyone always reviews when things aren’t the best, but this Dunkin’ is by far the best. The most frustrating thing when ordering coffee is inconsistency, but I never have that problem at this location. Mobile ordering also works perfectly here. I attribute it to the friendly, fabulous staff here. Thanks for all you do!!!
Nice clean place
Iced coffee day :)
Its Dunkin Donuts,  whats not to love!! Clean,  great service
Great coffee, good service
Food fresh everyday good coffee ginuein people!

I stick my head in often and alwa6grab my AARP coffee, went to get it today and was told they no longer do it, huh!! I was just in there dude, wow what's going on...potentially won't be going back but 6 days ago it was a good experience there
Coffee and breakfast!
Frozen coffee was just ok...but I could have really really did without the nasty attitude of the cashier...
Really nice, helpful staff

love the store but the sign off I-77 is covered by another sign and that one makes it look like it is in the opposite direction than it is. it makes it hard to fine. which is a shame because your store is clean and bright and the service is good.
Great location, clean environment. Not very welcoming, but overall it's ok.
Their ice cream cakes are so yummy! I highly recommend them! Oh and their donuts and coffee are pretty great too! :-)

This is in kind of a weird location. It had decent service. I went at about 6-7 at night and there were these 3 college students working there they were all very nice but they got my order wrong I asked for a Carmel macchiato and the gave me a caramel latte, not really complaining tho I love both equally just wanted a macciato.
The staff was very helpful. Took time to answer all my questions.
Friendly and fast ... good job guys
Nice breakfast sandwiches

Every single time I come into this store it's on my way to work, and I'm usually stopping to bring donuts to share with my fellow employees. It's usually early morning but they are always smiling and willing to indulge my crazy.
Very clean store and fast service.
Pretty clean. Friendly staff. Reasonably priced.
Staff are very friendly and helpful
I show a employee smoking back where they make the food.
Fast service with a smile

Overcharged for my order. When I asked why, I was told that the correct button on the register isn't working so the manager instructed the staff to charge for a premium upgrade. So sad to say this is true! I hope they correct this poor business practice
Always a great experience at this location
I go to Dunkin Donuts for the Carmel macchiato, last two visits here they have been out of carmel, will not go back to this one.

This place is just okay. They make good coffee,  but the service could use help. Came in a few days ago with my husband. The guy taking our order was looking at his cellphone the entire time.

I remember when I worked in the service industry (only 5 years ago) we weren’t allowed to have our phones out ever and ESPECIALLY not in front of a customer.
Fast clean good service
Brandon and Maddie you make my mornings!
It Dunkin, what more do you want?

The owner is a psycho jerk and a steroid meathead who verbally attacked my husband for using the WiFi while in the parking lot. We live down the street and have been frequent good customers for a long time and spent plenty of hard earned dollars there. We moved in a new location and had no internet so he ran down to use the internet. The owner flipped out. He wouldn’t even calm down long enough to listen to him and chased him down the street like he was going to attack him. He treated him like a criminal (He’s 46 and has never even had a speeding ticket) He was in his white work van, not his Audi or my BMW, so I guess he was being judgmental? I have been a business owner for 20 years and would never treat my customers like that! Never again will we step foot in that overrated establishment!  Very poor ownership!
Easy location, limited parking. Has a drive thru. Good menu and coffees. Less expensive than a Starbucks. Service a bit slow.
Very accommodating staff, Brian and Brandon especially exceed all expectations and make something as simple as getting breakfast a fun and enjoyable experience!
Fantastic service and quick serve time. An important part of my Sunday routine. Staff are very friendly and the place decorates based on the time of year.
Best place around!
Fresh and tasty
Great place
The new Order to Go feature on the app is awesome!
Great staff and very clean!

UPDATE: Originally scored down as a two-star, but the manager apologized and is going to talk to the team. Appreciate that it's being handled.

Showed up at the shop tonight at 9:50 for a donut and couldn't get my cheat treat because all the doors were locked even though the posted closing time was 10. More to the story, but that's the gist. At the end of the day it's just a donut but still a frustrating experience. Wish I could be rating the quality of the food and not how I was treated by an employee but that's life.
We visited during the parade so they were very busy. Did not sacrifice quality or quickness of service. Good job.
Young kids operating. Lack of professionalism. Headquarters needs to look into this place.

reviews_data.author_title: It’s in the Details! Renovations and Repairs
reviews_data.review_text: Chocolate cake w/ chocolate icing. ..yes please!
Better coffee than S-bucks. Friendly staff. Check your order before you drive off though. lol
Most consistent and best Dunkin’ in the LKN area. Brian and the crew are great.
Good place, could use more staff weekend mornings. Our family loves the doughnuts
Service is great!
Food here is great the drinks are really good the service is quick.
Service was really good and fast!
New store in Cornelius has the same great coffee.
What's not to like about Dunkin
it's within walking distance from the house
Good and clean
Cozy end with friendly neighborhood shops
Great staff

raw_data.description: Long-running chain serving signature breakfast items & a variety of coffee drinks.
raw_data.name: Dunkin'

posts.body: Dunkin’ Rewards® members, here is your wake up call! Enjoy 4X points on a Wake-Up Wrap® sandwich purchase today, 3/23 when this offer is activated in the app. Terms apply.
It’s the biggest deal in breakfast! For a limited time, get a medium Coffee + Bacon, Egg and Cheese + Hash Browns for $6. Terms and exclusions apply.

Dunkin’ Rewards® members, get ready to slay the slump! When you activate this offer in the app, you can sip away and stay caffeinated! For $3, try a NEW medium Dunkin’ Zero from 1PM to close, through 3/18. Made with zero sugar, these sips are packed with 145mg of caffeine and B vitamins. Terms apply.

50 bonus points? Now that’s sweet! When they activate this offer in the app, Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 50 bonus points each day they add Chocolate Cold Foam to any beverage through 3/2. Terms & excl. apply.

Dunkin’ Rewards® members, this is a race to the finish! Activate this badge challenge in the app and earn up to 250 bonus points and a FREE Classic Donut! Through 2/22, complete the Winter Winner challenge by making Dunkin’ runs and earn bonuses along the way. Terms apply.

Share the love at Dunkin’! Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 3X points on an order of espresso drinks for Valentine’s Day today, 2/14, when they activate this offer in the app. It’s a perfect time to fall for our NEW Toxic Ex-presso Latte. Terms & excl. apply.
Refresh it every day at Dunkin’! Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 3X points on a daily order of Dunkin’ Refreshers through 2/7 when they activate this offer in the app. Terms & excl. apply.

Valentine’s Day is brewing at Dunkin’! For a limited time, fall in love with these treats! From our NEW Toxic Ex-presso to our NEW Chocolate Covered Strawberry Daydream Refresher, there is always something to satisfy your craving. Don’t forget to celebrate with the return of our Brownie Batter and Cupid’s Choice Donuts!

Dunkin’ has your snow day essentials! Through 1/25, Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 3X points on boxes of donuts and MUNCHKINS® Donut Hole Treats when they activate this offer in the app. Terms & excl. apply.
Get your protein on us! Dunkin’ Rewards® members can add our NEW protein milk to any Latte for FREE now through 1/27. Terms & excl. apply.

reviews_data.review_text: 40 minutes wait for a coffee and a bagel.....felt like this was their first day in business but they have been there for years.
Quick and easy one amd out!
Great breakfast sandwiches and of course, the donuts. Great variety for everyone!
Excellent service and pleasant atmosphere; however, the coffee is somewhat bitter, depending on the shift. ☕

I went in about an hour before closing and ordered a hot decaf coffee and some munchkins. I was told that they had no coffee. (What?!?!  It’s a coffee and donut shop!). After asking for a refund of what I had paid at the ordering kiosk, I was offered a latte instead, which I turned down because I wanted a hot coffee When I mentioned I would take regular coffee if they didn’t have decaf, a server told me that they had decaf. I told her that was my order and that was what I wanted so she proceeded to bring me a decaf. She also gathered my munchkins and even put in a few extra, which I appreciated. When I took a sip of the decaf coffee, it was cold. Cold. Not even lukewarm . Cold.  I asked if there was a way for them to heat it, maybe stick it in a microwave or something, but was told there was no way to do that. All in all it was a very disappointing trip, the worst experience I’ve ever had at a Dunkin - and I’ve frequented lots of Dunkins over the years. I want to be clear that the server was polite and treated me respectfully, but the store was unable to provide its basic menu drink item, a hot cup of coffee.  Ridiculous!

I want to give a huge shoutout to the Dunkin’ Donuts located on Old Statesville and Catawba in Cornelius. Even though this location doesn’t have a drive-thru—which can be a little inconvenient—the service here truly makes the walk worth it.

Every time I visit, the employees are full of joy, energy, and genuine smiles. From my experience, they consistently go above and beyond to make sure their customers leaves happy. There are several Dunkin’ locations closer to me, but I choose to drive the extra mile to this one simply because of their outstanding customer service.

I truly appreciate the crew at this location and want the managers to know how wonderful their team is. Their kindness and positivity stand out every single day. Keep up the amazing work! 🎉☕️🍩
This place is Circus ,  This one guy all he do is talk with a lobby full of people . Don’t get me wrong the drinks are good but I pass on coming to this one
Terrible breakfast sandwich
I am absenced with avocado toast!

This is a cute location—don’t get me wrong. Unfortunately, this will likely be my first and last visit. The staff really needs to work on their customer service skills.

I came in specifically for a Cookie Dough Dunkalatte and was told they only had Brown Sugar and that they don’t sell anything cookie dough-related. Meanwhile, right behind them, their sign clearly advertised both a Cookie Dough frozen beverage and a Cookie Dough coffee. When I pointed this out, it wasn’t addressed—and the tone I got from Erik (at least that’s the name on my receipt) felt passive-aggressive the entire time.

The one bright spot was the person who handed me my food—they were polite and pleasant. It’s a shame, because the visit started off with potential, but the experience didn’t live up to it.

I order from here frequently but this morning in particular the hash browns were nice and hot and my bagel sandwich was delicious as well! (And I ordered a plain bagel by mistake but wasn’t even disappointed) So thank you to whoever made my mobile order around 8am on 6/2!
Great food and people.
Some of the workers here really do a great job, and some of them will mess my order up every single time, without fail, and rant about their boss openly. It’s always a coin flip if you go here.

I just want to take a minute to recognize the amazing staff at the dunkin donuts on zion street in cornelius nc. Most of the staff appear to be younger adults and high school students. They give great customer service. They are always polite and they communicate well with each other when it gets busy. And this store does get busy. These kids work! Trey was especially helpful this morning but he's always a ray of sunshine. Seriously. He's great! For reference I have been a regular at this store. Everyday. For the past year. These kids do a very good job!

Can't speak to the customer service, as I walked in and right out. This store is filthy... Floors littered with trash and spills.  If this is what the customer sees I don't even want to see the back of the house.

I love this Dunkin. It's really special to go into a national chain and be treated like I'm walking into my local coffee shop. The food and drinks are always great and super fresh. My elderly mom goes in almost every day, and she's treated beautifully and with great respect every time, which is something you don't see all the time in our culture, and something I hugely appreciate. The manager, Dimitri, seems to pretty much always be there, and he obviously takes great pride in the store and in the performance of his staff.

Just close it down.
Couldn’t get any worse .  Everyone with their hoodies on,  take the trash out, don’t wash their hands and go straight to grab your donut
Well that was an expensive cup of ice.
Crappy service and the employees are rude and annoyed by customer. They work at Dunkin and can’t even make a coffee correctly.
Ishmael was amazing with his service and smile 😊 The Sabrina drink is 9/10 but good 😊  Thank you !

Hey I usually go here because it’s reliably good. But we threw out pretty much all the food we got. For $20 two coffees were horrible. Peppermint mocha smelled like peppermint and tasted like water. Cappuccino was soooo bitter. The hash browns tasted like they were cooked in old oil with a weird fishy taste. $20!!!! Go somewhere else.
Beautiful inside.

I called in a total Hail Mary the morning of Sept. 26th and the staff on duty were able to help me so efficiently and kindly. I can't say enough about how accommodating the staff is - they made about 10 gallons of coffee in 20 minutes. Thank you thank you thank you!!
THEE best Dunkin! Order is always accurate which can be hard to come by. Fast service and kind people!
Too slow to be in business. It's like it's their first time doing anything except taking money.

Thank you to the sweet man who served us. When my son's ice cream fell on the floor I thought his little heart was going to be crushed, but honey, you whipped him up another scoop and told him it was going to be ok so fast he had no chance to shed a tear. Lol thank you for being you!

I’ve been coming here for a few years. I use the app religiously and nervous to see how much money I’ve actually spent here. There has been a high turnover with staff over the years. The current staff knows the product and has been here for a while now. They are extremely courteous, kind and fun to talk with. I’m only giving 4 stars because the frozen coffee machine has been down for 2 weeks. I’m holding that 5th star hostage until it’s fixed. I don’t want it mixed in the Baskin Robbins side as a substitute. I’ll call the owner, Bob D Donut, myself if I have to.

I am a DAILY customer of the Zion Street location in Cornelius, NC. Due to the heat & humidity today I requested a small cup of tap water for my dog when picking up my order. I was told there would be a charge of $0.55
which I declined on principal. I guess 55 cents is more important than retaining a loyal customer!
Always quick and friendly service
Nice Dunkin. Very  busy one. Typical chain donut shop fare. Coffee tasted stale even at morning rush.

This place disappointed. Both breakfast sandwiches came out ice cold. Then when they remade the sandwiches the came out cold again. Also I’ve asked for the new white chocolate hazelnut coffee and the past 3 weeks the say that they are out of white chocolate!

Came in at 6:20 on a Wednesday & the cashier was sitting talking to her friend who does not work there and did not want to take our order because “they did not know the password to the computer to be able to take the order and the manager wasn’t there.” How are you gonna be open and not know the password to take orders. That’s crazy.

Usually go with my daughter almost every Sunday like around 4 and I order the same caramel macchiato but today was bitter and disgusting plus the girl server was rude they need to pay attention to the costumers instead of the boyfriend.....today is the last time me and my daughter are going to your business......and kind of regret not asking for my money back!!!

Two young boys were the only employees serving. My husband and I waited 20 minutes for 2 coffees and I had to keep asking for the 2nd drink. They made sporadic drinks for different orders. All of the customers in the store were frustrated. My coffee was not made correctly and they were playing the worst country music. Was not worth the time or money. They needed a supervisor present.
Superb service 👏 staff
Pretty friendly. Pretty good milkshake.

Great food.
9/26/2023:  Poor service.  Sourdough Breakfast Sandwich quality has degraded.
The store is clean. The team is somewhat friendly. My orders have been prompt and made correctly.
This is a great DD. It's huge & very clean. The employees are so nice.
Coffee ☕️ and free Wi-Fi
Great Sour Cream Donuts!🥯😬

Haven't been to a Dunkin in quiet some time. Went in to get a Hot Fudge Sundae, they did have it on the menu.
The employee at counter said she wasn't sure if they had Hot Fudge, they are often out but then checked and said they did.
I got a scoop of ice cream in a cup with a spoonful of thick brown clumpy sludge on top. They were also out of nuts and whipped cream.
So really no sundae. Poor Experience all around.
Dunkin is Dunkin is Dunkin. This one was well kept, and the staff were quick and pleasant.

Been a customer for years. This place had gone downhill for the past 10 years. All the coffee tastes the same. Burned. The overpriced breakfast sandwiches taste microwaved and not fresh @ all. I ordered the sourdough breakfast sandwich with “fried eggs” cheese and bacon. I assumed the bread would be toasted. Nope. Stale & chewy. It was all bread, the sandwich was put together sloppy. Two tiny pieces of rubbery bacon with no flavor. Eggs were microwaved with gross sour cheese. Just an all around disappointment. I’m done with Dunkin’s
Not the best place too many Karens
got there at drive up 7:40 pm 5/21/23...was told closed and no food available! supposed to be open until 8 pm! the 3rd time this happened. had to drive back to mcdonalds. NEVER AGAIN!!!!

I love Dunkin. I truly do but today we went and saw so much food thrown in the trash. I am so confused as to why we do this knowing people are starving and hungry. I think the closing manager should take what is left over at the end of the day and feed the homeless. And not only at this Dunkin but at evey Dunkin and restaurants as well. This is the only reason I am giving this place a 3. This was hard to see knowing I was once homeless and hungry. We as a country need to do better.
Order ahead and ready in minutes
Good staff and selection.

If there were a Zero Star option, I would have chosen Zero.
Terrible experience. Ordered a small Chai Tea Latte. 10 minutes later I went to check on my order. One girl looks at the other, and come to find out my ticket wasn't dropped. Another 5 minutes go by, still no Chai Tea Latte. Ended up getting a full refund, ironically as the manager is starting her shift and says, "I don't have time to deal with this right now." I guess the customer service, or lack there of is unimportant at this location? No one, including the manager, even attempted to fix a simple wrong. I will not be going back to this location.

Very busy and excellent workers work fast.
Had sour dough sandwich which was large and nice. Positive experience.
Same again
It's a Dunkin. Nothing more nothing less.
Slow and understaffed during peak hours, self-service kiosk is broken. Don’t come here thinking you’ll get a quick in-and-out.

Been to this location several times and noticed on the weekends a lot of students like to hang out, which is great. The problem is when they're a distraction for the staff. I ordered on the go curbside from my car and waited more than 6 minutes before coming inside to find the staff standing around talking. When asked about my order he stated he didn't see my car and when later asked to remake the drink his attitude was dismissive. Thankfully another cashier stepped in to help.
My favorite.... always went on my way to work....love it!!!
Good menu, good prices but the hash browns were a little bit burn

This is out of the ordinary for me but I feel as though I must leave a third party review. I received a disturbing text message from a friend who stated he had gone to the bathroom at said Dunkin’ Donuts. I was informed they were out of toilet paper, which always brings a bathroom review way down. Thinking outside the box, paper towels were the best option. Guess what happened next. You guess it, another bathroom trying to save the planet by using an air drier! How many more times do customers need to suffer by not having paper towels? Wake up America, not having paper towels in a bathroom isn’t saving a planet. You’re losing customers by doing this. I would highly recommend not using the bathroom. As they have no means of cleaning yourself and I have idea what was ultimately used for toilet paper in that bathroom today. Again, really scary receiving a text like this from a close friend. Really disappointed to start my day like this.

review_questions.null: Dietary restrictions, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text: Wonderful location, and the brewed coffee was amazing! I have not tried an actual coffee drink yet, but I love all the different options you can add to your brew without a million extra charges! Super delicious and will definitely be going back!!
Did not have a good selection of donuts to chose from. Staff needs to be trained
The employees here are SO NICE.

manager was in the back no one in the front to wait on me got the manager to the front he was not friendly made me the wrong drink not at all what I ordered and the girl beside him wiped her nose with her hand and did not go wash her hands and I told the manager what I saw he didn't seem to care
and then I got my money back and will not go back to the one at Zion in Cornelius
Always good here

The best
Good service.
Very friendly, very fast.
We stop here every morning. Place is clean. You get in and out pretty quick.
Love it.
Great service. Very friendly staff.
Terrible Service, save your self time and money and drive down the road to the other Dunkin’ location!

Kudos to the staff that just helped us 2 ladies out as they were closing early due to lack of staff. We both sincerely appreciate you for helping us out in a tough situation! You both ROCK!!!
Seems everyone is struggling to find enough help to cover the increase in business so hang in there, Duncan needs you...and we appreciate your kindness so much!😉
Its Dunkin what more could you ask for! This location is close to my work so I am a frequent visitor. The cold brew pumpkin is especially delicious! High five highly recommended!
I have been enjoying the 100% guatemalan coffee with flavor shots!
Standing in line, waiting to order and cashier let's someone pay for coffee ahead of me. Left and will never go back.
All the employees were super sweet. Store was clean & organized

Walked in the door at around 8:30pm (store closes at 9) and the worker, who clearly has never been trained in customer service, practically shoved us out of the door with a rolling trash can. She said the store was closing and that she wouldn’t serve us. I rarely ever write poor reviews, but her demeanor and attitude were completely uncalled for. Please reevaluate your staff.
It was awesome

This place is very poorly managed. Though the employees have always been polite, the service is typically slow and they never know what promotions they have going on. The employees don't wear masks, even when they are mandated. I watched a visibly ill employee, with no face covering, cough right by the donuts and right into her hands, then proceed to continue ringing people up and touching food without washing her hands or putting on gloves. This is not okay. Do better.
It's very clean, and the staff is courteous. Ice cream AND donuts under one roof should be illegal, but the grandkids love it!

The restaurant was clean and orderly and staff was friendly. The donuts had a decent amount of icing on them.. other ones I've been to were skimpy with icing for some reason. Also, I was able to go in and sit down with my family in this one.
Drinks are gross
Quick, standard. In and out.
Great frozen coffee!
D&D
Terrible.   That is my 2nd and final trip.  People were rude and wanted to argue about donuts.
Not busy, not much offered, expensive

I decided to try this location for the first time and it was extremely upsetting. I drove up to the window and ordered 3 large iced coffees, I asked the girl at the window to place the drinks in the tray and to place the tray in a bag to hold them steady so they wouldn’t topple over, she didn’t understand what that meant, after a couple of times of repeating myself another employee came up and I was so frustrated that I just asked for the bag to do it myself, at which point I was forced to bring the drinks from the drive-through window into the car myself, sure enough it toppled over! My entire center console, shifter, infotainment controls, seats and knobs were not only bathed but soaked in all the iced mocha coffee.  You need to find a better way to get multiple drinks fit in a way that this doesn’t happen, and in the meantime explain to your employees the simple concept of -Drinks in tray, tray in bag, & tie so they’re all firm and in place. The entire cabin of my car is now in need of a full detailing for this one minor screw up that could’ve been avoided with following a few simple steps! Also, this has never happened at the other location in Huntersville, so now I’ll know to only go there.
Enjoyed my visit. Prompt service
Only Garbage can outside
Very fast service clean store.
I'm not sure if the doughnuts are still cooked on-site or not, but this location lightly glazes their crullers and that makes all the difference.
Stopped there today they are very nice

Love the coffee......
UPDATE: 1/25/21
I love Dunkin I order everyday and sometimes twice a day. I wish this Dunkin wasn't the only one near my house. I think the employees are great and friendly. Great coffee but the manager at this one is so rude. She has no customer service skills. She gives the most unfriendly looks and her face just always looks mad. Obviously she knows she isn't going to get in trouble for treating customer horrible. I know of 3 different customers she has been rude too. And it's bc she messed up. Not giving the right bag to the right car or making the drink wrong. She acts like it's not her job to fix what she messed up. I'm almost convinced she has to be related to the owner. No one who cares about there business would keep someone like her employed otherwise. And again it's like she knows nothing is going to happen. Basically she will say that to you. I know they can see the reviews on here and at least 3 speak of the manger being rude. That should tell you something. Anyway I hope things get better at this store. I love Dunkin but I dread ordering and going there when she is there. Other than her the staff is great.....

I am very frustrated with the management at this location. The girl Jessica is always super rude even without any issues. I ordered breakfast the other morning with coffees and they forgot my food. After realizing the food wasn't in the bag, I called and the manager was very rude and said I parked in the wrong place, which was completely irrelevant and there is only 2 curbside spots. I will not be going back because after calling all they do is apologize and say that she has worked there a long time.
Very pleasant staff. Decaf coffee brewed and ready.Perfect cup of coffee.
My 7 year old daughter says, " it's very delicious, and their ice cream is the best". Bathrooms were neatly kept too.

Accidentally ordered at the wrong location through the app. Called that location and they said it happens all the time and they honor the order and help you call the app to get your refund. It happens to be Saturday which is outside the hours for customer service for the app. So I talked to a manager at my home store (this one) and talked to them. They said I'm out of luck. They would ring up my order and hopefully I could get my money back from the app on Monday. So I'm going to drive 30 minutes to the other store and 30 minutes back to get my $10 order and I'll never go to this store again. Treat me well and I'll give you my business which is twice a week. Tell me you can't help me and I'll just not visit your store again. Thanks.

Be a bit cautious at this store, some of the employees may not be well trained in sanitary procedure. One employee, using a gloved hand that had just been handling money pulled a tissue from the dispenser and used it to bag my donut. That’s fine, but she dropped the tissue in too, dirty side up, and dropped the next donut right on top of the dirty tissue which had just been in her money handling hand. That second tissue remained in the bag too, dirty side up. My regular Dublin’ seems not to have this problem, they use a tissue, drop the donuts, throw the tissue in the trash, pretty simple.
Food and coffee incorrect 50% of the time.
Manager super rude. During these times a little kindness goes far.
Very courteous, great customer service
Messed up my order. Though, they made my drink correctly free of charge and let me keep the wrong drink. Chicken croissant was ok. The bacon and croissant were burned.
Awesome people work there
Quaint store , off the beaten trail
Friendly service, hot coffee, sweet donuts
Employees are incredibly rude.
Very nice staff—. Attentive and friendly —just a suggestion making that patio look more inviting after walking the new greenway trail that just opened up across the street from you guys
Good store with greatanagement and service.
Friendly staff and very fast I just wish they will get my order right.
Always quick service and friendly people
Always good coffee & donuts!
I was a bit disappointed. The coffee was weak and I found the donuts old.
Great employees that work there!
Too expensive
My morning stop
Good food and service
Yummy
I love Dunkin' DONUTS great tastin' and service is always Great.

Everyone always reviews when things aren’t the best, but this Dunkin’ is by far the best. The most frustrating thing when ordering coffee is inconsistency, but I never have that problem at this location. Mobile ordering also works perfectly here. I attribute it to the friendly, fabulous staff here. Thanks for all you do!!!
Nice clean place
Iced coffee day :)
Its Dunkin Donuts,  whats not to love!! Clean,  great service
Great coffee, good service
Food fresh everyday good coffee ginuein people!

I stick my head in often and alwa6grab my AARP coffee, went to get it today and was told they no longer do it, huh!! I was just in there dude, wow what's going on...potentially won't be going back but 6 days ago it was a good experience there
Coffee and breakfast!
Frozen coffee was just ok...but I could have really really did without the nasty attitude of the cashier...
Really nice, helpful staff

love the store but the sign off I-77 is covered by another sign and that one makes it look like it is in the opposite direction than it is. it makes it hard to fine. which is a shame because your store is clean and bright and the service is good.
Great location, clean environment. Not very welcoming, but overall it's ok.
Their ice cream cakes are so yummy! I highly recommend them! Oh and their donuts and coffee are pretty great too! :-)

This is in kind of a weird location. It had decent service. I went at about 6-7 at night and there were these 3 college students working there they were all very nice but they got my order wrong I asked for a Carmel macchiato and the gave me a caramel latte, not really complaining tho I love both equally just wanted a macciato.
The staff was very helpful. Took time to answer all my questions.
Friendly and fast ... good job guys
Nice breakfast sandwiches

Every single time I come into this store it's on my way to work, and I'm usually stopping to bring donuts to share with my fellow employees. It's usually early morning but they are always smiling and willing to indulge my crazy.
Very clean store and fast service.
Pretty clean. Friendly staff. Reasonably priced.
Staff are very friendly and helpful
I show a employee smoking back where they make the food.
Fast service with a smile

Overcharged for my order. When I asked why, I was told that the correct button on the register isn't working so the manager instructed the staff to charge for a premium upgrade. So sad to say this is true! I hope they correct this poor business practice
Always a great experience at this location
I go to Dunkin Donuts for the Carmel macchiato, last two visits here they have been out of carmel, will not go back to this one.

This place is just okay. They make good coffee,  but the service could use help. Came in a few days ago with my husband. The guy taking our order was looking at his cellphone the entire time.

I remember when I worked in the service industry (only 5 years ago) we weren’t allowed to have our phones out ever and ESPECIALLY not in front of a customer.
Fast clean good service
Brandon and Maddie you make my mornings!
It Dunkin, what more do you want?

The owner is a psycho jerk and a steroid meathead who verbally attacked my husband for using the WiFi while in the parking lot. We live down the street and have been frequent good customers for a long time and spent plenty of hard earned dollars there. We moved in a new location and had no internet so he ran down to use the internet. The owner flipped out. He wouldn’t even calm down long enough to listen to him and chased him down the street like he was going to attack him. He treated him like a criminal (He’s 46 and has never even had a speeding ticket) He was in his white work van, not his Audi or my BMW, so I guess he was being judgmental? I have been a business owner for 20 years and would never treat my customers like that! Never again will we step foot in that overrated establishment!  Very poor ownership!
Easy location, limited parking. Has a drive thru. Good menu and coffees. Less expensive than a Starbucks. Service a bit slow.
Very accommodating staff, Brian and Brandon especially exceed all expectations and make something as simple as getting breakfast a fun and enjoyable experience!
Fantastic service and quick serve time. An important part of my Sunday routine. Staff are very friendly and the place decorates based on the time of year.
Best place around!
Fresh and tasty
Great place
The new Order to Go feature on the app is awesome!
Great staff and very clean!

UPDATE: Originally scored down as a two-star, but the manager apologized and is going to talk to the team. Appreciate that it's being handled.

Showed up at the shop tonight at 9:50 for a donut and couldn't get my cheat treat because all the doors were locked even though the posted closing time was 10. More to the story, but that's the gist. At the end of the day it's just a donut but still a frustrating experience. Wish I could be rating the quality of the food and not how I was treated by an employee but that's life.
We visited during the parade so they were very busy. Did not sacrifice quality or quickness of service. Good job.
Young kids operating. Lack of professionalism. Headquarters needs to look into this place.

reviews_data.author_title: It’s in the Details! Renovations and Repairs
reviews_data.review_text: Chocolate cake w/ chocolate icing. ..yes please!
Better coffee than S-bucks. Friendly staff. Check your order before you drive off though. lol
Most consistent and best Dunkin’ in the LKN area. Brian and the crew are great.
Good place, could use more staff weekend mornings. Our family loves the doughnuts
Service is great!
Food here is great the drinks are really good the service is quick.
Service was really good and fast!
New store in Cornelius has the same great coffee.
What's not to like about Dunkin
it's within walking distance from the house
Good and clean
Cozy end with friendly neighborhood shops
Great staff

raw_data.name: Dunkin'

posts.body: Dunkin’ Rewards® members, here is your wake up call! Enjoy 4X points on a Wake-Up Wrap® sandwich purchase today, 3/23 when this offer is activated in the app. Terms apply.
It’s the biggest deal in breakfast! For a limited time, get a medium Coffee + Bacon, Egg and Cheese + Hash Browns for $6. Terms and exclusions apply.

Dunkin’ Rewards® members, get ready to slay the slump! When you activate this offer in the app, you can sip away and stay caffeinated! For $3, try a NEW medium Dunkin’ Zero from 1PM to close, through 3/18. Made with zero sugar, these sips are packed with 145mg of caffeine and B vitamins. Terms apply.

50 bonus points? Now that’s sweet! When they activate this offer in the app, Dunkin’ Rewards® members can enjoy 50 bonus points each day they add Chocolate Cold Foam to any beverage through 3/2. Terms & excl. apply.
